prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年大连理工大学在山西省理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约5704名→5410名→3757名→2697名→2498名，呈持续前移趋势，近4年累计前移约3206名，2025年基准位次约2498名，表明该校在山西理科考生中的认可度持续攀升；2021年计划171人，2022年144人，2023年144人，2024年127人，2025年121人，2026年物理类计划仅80人，较2025年大幅缩减约33.9%，缩招幅度显著，将加剧竞争，推动录取位次进一步前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第28名（Top20），近年排名稳定在28–32名区间，属于国内顶尖工科强校；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及历史投档线异常事件；抖音综合热度排名第55位（较热），短视频平台有一定曝光度；整体声誉中性偏弱，对报考热度略有抑制；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术A+、机械工程A、力学A、土木工程A、工商管理A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A、生物医学工程A，A-及以上学科共10个，工科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校优势工科专业高度契合；山西省2026年物理类考生约167419人，较2025年减少约5928人（-3.4%），考生规模小幅下降，竞争略有缓解；大连理工大学位于辽宁省大连市，非本省高校，在山西省无本地招生倾斜；该校在辽宁本省招生占比约20%左右，在山西属跨省招生，地域偏好对报考影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2498名、2026年物理类招生计划大幅缩减33.9%（加剧竞争）、物理类考生减少3.4%（缓解竞争）、学校声誉偏负面（略抑热度）等多重因素，结合考生减少和声誉因素做小幅修正，预测2026年理科（物理类）最低录取位次约2020名，区间1818–2222名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Dalian University of Technology in Shanxi Province's science (physics category) were approximately 5704 → 5410 → 3757 → 2697 → 2498, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative increase of about 3206 places in the past 4 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2498, indicating rising recognition among Shanxi science candidates. The enrollment plan was 171 in 2021, 144 in 2022, 144 in 2023, 127 in 2024, 121 in 2025, and only 80 for the physics category in 2026, a significant reduction of about 33.9% compared to 2025. This sharp reduction will intensify competition and push admission rankings further upward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 28th (Top20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 28–32 range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic engineering strong schools. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving historical abnormal admission score incidents. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 55th (relatively hot), with some exposure on short video platforms. Overall reputation is neutral to weak, slightly suppressing application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Biomedical Engineering A, with a total of 10 A- and above disciplines, strong engineering strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering are highly recommended in social heat, highly consistent with the university's advantageous engineering majors. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shanxi Province is about 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.4%) compared to 2025, with a slight decline in candidate scale, slightly easing competition. Dalian University of Technology is located in Dalian City, Liaoning Province, not a local university in Shanxi, with no local admission preference in Shanxi. The university's admission proportion in Liaoning Province is about 20%, and in Shanxi it is cross-provincial admission, with regional preference having a neutral impact on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2498, a significant 33.9% reduction in the 2026 physics category enrollment plan (intensifying competition), a 3.4% decrease in physics category candidates (easing competition), and a slightly negative school reputation (slightly suppressing enthusiasm), with minor corrections due to candidate reduction and reputation factors, the predicted minimum admission ranking for the 2026 science (physics category) is about 2020, with a range of 1818–2222.

- Electronic Information (Innovation Class) (including Electronic Information Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Future Robotics, etc.)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 2020, range 1818–2222. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. Candidates significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1800) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence Master Class, Computer Top Talent Class). Candidates near the upper limit of the range (around 2200) are advised to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, with Tier 2 as a supplement.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Dalian University of Technology began enrolling liberal arts (history category) students in Shanxi Province in 2024. In 2024, the minimum liberal arts ranking was approximately 1510, and in 2025, the minimum history category ranking was approximately 1990, a decline of about 480 places in one year, indicating a decrease in popularity of the university's liberal arts programs in Shanxi. In 2024, the liberal arts plan was 15 students; in 2025, the history category plan was 16 students; in 2026, the history category plan is 18 students, a slight expansion of 12.5% compared to 2025, leading to a slight easing of competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 28th in the 2026 Soft Science Rankings, with a very high university level, but the university is known for its strengths in science and engineering, with relatively small liberal arts programs. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative; Douyin popularity ranking is 55th (relatively popular); overall reputation is neutral to weak, with limited impact on liberal arts applications. Business Administration (A) and Management Science and Engineering (A) are strong management disciplines, somewhat related to the liberal arts enrollment majors of Public Administration and Business Administration.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, there are approximately 63,113 history category examinees in Shanxi Province, a significant decrease of about 21,766 (-25.6%) compared to 2025, with a notable reduction in the number of examinees, significantly easing competition. Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province, not a local university in Shanxi. It offers only 3 liberal arts enrollment majors (Public Administration, Architecture, English), which are small in scale and not the university's advantageous directions, making cross-province applications relatively less attractive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1990, a 12.5% expansion of the 2026 history category plan (easing competition), a significant 25.6% reduction in history category examinees (significantly easing competition), the relatively weak liberal arts strength of the university, and other factors, combined with a minor adjustment due to the limited appeal of the university's liberal arts programs, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 liberal arts (history category) is approximately 2159, with a range of 1943–2375.

- Public Administration (including Public Administration + Artificial Intelligence Dual Degree Program, Intellectual Property).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 2159, range 1943–2375. Dalian University of Technology offers very few liberal arts enrollment majors in Shanxi (only 3). If the ranking is within the range, it is recommended to prioritize Public Administration, with Architecture as a backup and English as a safety option. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1900), priority can be given to the Public Administration dual degree program. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (above 2300), it is recommended to use English as a safety option.
